name: confidential-counter-orchestration
description: SNIP-36 prove -> decode -> execute orchestration for the confidential counter shard.
//: VERIFY: proof submission needs a proof-ENABLED starknet.js (getSignedTransaction + execute with {proof, proofFacts}). The SNIP-36 reference impl orchestrates in RUST and submits via the sequencer gateway; a public starknet.js fork was NOT confirmed. If none exists, drive the flow with the Rust `snip36` CLI instead (see README).
